judge.opinion: We're in the uncomfortable part of the cycle — the Anxiety grind where nobody wants to hold but the flush is running out of fuel. Fear & Greed at 25 is screaming, the August 2024 bottom pattern is the closest analog at 0.79 similarity, and the score at 41 says we're one rung below Disbelief. The market is pricing in a continuation of pain that the historical pattern says is nearly exhausted. I'm leaning long — not because today feels good, but because this is where the turn happens. The trade is boring, the position is uncomfortable, and that's exactly what the bottom of the ladder feels like.
